surface_forms: a small town in northern California called Crescent City
description: city in and seat of Del Norte County, California, United States
description_wiki: Crescent City (Tolowa: Taa-’at-dvn; Yurok: Kohpey; Wiyot: Daluwagh) is the only incorporated city in Del Norte County, California, United States, of which it is also the county seat.

description: city in and county seat of King County, State of Washington, United States
description_wiki: Seattle (  see-AT-əl) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Washington and the Pacific Northwest region of North America.

aliases: Saint Paul, Ramsey, Minnesota, United States
description: capital of the state of Minnesota, United States; county seat of Ramsey County, Minnesota

description_wiki: Concordia University is a public university in Montréal, Quebec.
